title: helichrysum foliosum
intro: Helichrysum foliosum, also known as the leafy everlast or leafy strawflower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of helichrysum foliosum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and protecting against cell damage and oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including essential oils, capsules, and teas, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
